title: Cinderella (Fairy Godmother)
summary: The fairy godmother's magical promise - warm, kind, enchanted voice.
prompt: "Now then, child, dry your tears," said the fairy godmother, with a kindly twinkle in her eye. "You shall go to the ball, and you shall be the loveliest one there." She waved her wand, and the pumpkin became a glittering carriage. "But remember this, my dear: at the very stroke of midnight, the spell will end. Whatever you do, you must be home before then."
